summary: User reviewed a neuroscience research paper on medRxiv about using intracortical brain-computer interfaces to restore brain-to-text communication in a patient with dysarthria following pontine stroke. The PDF was viewed in Brave browser, appearing to be near the end of the document (page 23/23). A reference on neural interfaces for sensorimotor restoration was visible on screen. Research compliance information regarding patient consent and clinical trial registration was also shown.
